summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

CORE LOGIC:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

DEPENDENCIES:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- The class provides a basic implementation of the Counter interface.

CORE LOGIC:
- The class implements the Counter interface and provides methods to set and get the name, display name, and value of the counter.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The class has methods to set and get the name, display name, and value of the counter.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The class does not depend on any other classes.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- The CounterGroupBase interface provides a common interface for counter groups in Apache Hadoop MapReduce.

CORE LOGIC:
- The interface includes methods for getting and setting the name and display name of the group, adding and finding counters, and incrementing all counters by a group of counters.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The interface includes methods for adding and finding counters, which take a name, display name, and value as input, and return the counter that was added or found.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The interface depends on the Counter interface and the Writable interface.
